blockers.description: Inconsistent response format from third-party service (varying message/flag structures), making parsing unstable and blocking backend normalization.
Backend data structure changes depending on the endpoint, preventing further front-end development. This is a direct consequence of the inconsistent third-party API responses.

action_items.action: Resolve inconsistent response format from the third-party service and normalize the data structure.
